fields.Background\n: Raised as a quiet and withdrawn student, he learned early on to rely more on his sharp intellect than physical strength, making him used to analyzing people and situations to always stay one step ahead. He has often stood alone and avoided deeper relationships, but this has at the same time given him a strong independence and a relentless will to cope regardless of obstacles.
fields.Strengths\n: Sharp analytical skills and calm under pressure. Knows what to do to win a fight, even when the opponent is stronger or outnumbered, as he uses his intellect and ability to anticipate the next move rather than brute strength. He is reserved and often lonely, but behind his quiet surface hides a sense of purpose and a will to never give up, no matter how difficult the circumstances. His background as a withdrawn student means he doesn't trust others easily, but that independence has shaped him into a person who can always stand on his own two feet.
fields.Weaknesses\n: Physically weaker than many of their opponents and easily injured, has difficulty trusting others and often isolates themselves which makes cooperation more difficult, also carries a strong self-criticism that can become a mental burden in pressured situations.
